title: Gun mod by pisankus
body:
🎯 Basic Gun Mod - Comprehensive User Guide
Basic Gun Mod is a survival-friendly, balanced, and highly enjoyable Fabric mod that introduces modern firearms and melee equipment to your Minecraft world. It allows you to craft modern weapons using existing vanilla materials (iron, redstone, etc.) without breaking the natural flow of the game.

Below is a detailed explanation of all the weapons, ammunitions, crafting recipes, and special mechanics included in the mod.

🔫 Weapons & Features
1. Pistol
Your basic, lightweight firearm. Fast, reliable, and effective at close-to-medium ranges.

Ammo Type: Pistol Ammo
Firing Mode: Semi-Automatic (Fires on each click)
Crafting Materials: 3x Iron Ingot, 1x Stone Button (Shapeless - place anywhere in the crafting grid)
2. Assault Rifle
Your best friend against large groups of enemies. Hold down the button to unleash a rain of bullets!

Ammo Type: Rifle Ammo
Firing Mode: Fully Automatic (Hold to shoot continuously)
Special Mechanic: You will experience barrel recoil while firing continuously. You must drag your mouse down slightly to control your aim.
Crafting Materials: 6x Iron Ingot, 1x Dispenser, 2x Redstone Dust
3. Sniper Rifle
Designed to deal massive damage from long distances. Firing without aiming down the sights will result in very low accuracy.

Ammo Type: Sniper Ammo
Firing Mode: Single Shot (Slow fire rate, but extreme damage)
Special Mechanic (Scope & Zoom): While holding the weapon, Right-Click to aim down the scope. When the scope is active, bullet spread drops to zero, and your shots will hit the exact crosshair point.
Adjusting Zoom: While scoped in, you can use the Left Arrow and Right Arrow keys (by default) to dynamically adjust your zoom level from 1.5x up to 10.0x magnification. The current zoom level and the bound keys will be displayed at the bottom of your screen.
Crafting Materials: 4x Iron Ingot, 1x Spyglass, 1x String
4. Hunting Knife
A deadly melee weapon that swings faster than a sword, perfect for when you run out of ammo or need to be stealthy.

Features: Very high attack speed, good damage.
Crafting Materials: 1x Iron Ingot, 1x Stick
📦 Ammunition
Weapons require the appropriate ammunition in your inventory to fire. Like the weapons, ammo can be crafted shapelessly:

Pistol Ammo (Yields 16): 1x Iron Nugget, 1x Gunpowder
Rifle Ammo (Yields 32): 1x Iron Nugget, 2x Gunpowder
Sniper Ammo (Yields 8): 1x Iron Ingot, 2x Gunpowder
⚙️ Special Mod Mechanics
Shapeless Crafting: You do not need to memorize exact shapes or patterns for any recipe. Simply drop the required ingredients anywhere in the Crafting Table grid to get your item.
Dynamic Recoil: Firing weapons will cause your screen to kick upwards. Especially with the Assault Rifle, you must perform aim control by pulling your mouse down slightly while spraying.
Recipe Menu Command: While in-game, you can type /gun_recipe in the chat to open a visual menu displaying all weapon recipes. You can use the directional arrows in the menu to flip through pages and easily learn what the guns look like!
Auto-Unlock Recipes: The moment you join a world, all weapon and ammo recipes are automatically unlocked and added to your Recipe Book!
